arts.ttl: Second report claims Liverpool and Manchester City target is wanted by Real Madrid
arts.sum: Suitors are something that Real Sociedad lynchpin Martin Zubimendi has never been short of, and in each of the last three summers, he has been cited as a top target for one of Europe’s best sides. Barcelona were the first to pursue him with intention, but now rivals Real Madrid are considering a move for […] The post Second report claims Liverpool and Manchester City target is wanted by Real Madrid appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold 'TOLD Real Madrid to bid' for him in January, says Jamie Carragher, as Liverpool legend gives insight on £20m offer that Gary Neville calls 'bullies taking the p**s'
arts.sum: Madrid tabled a £20million offer last week to bring him immediately to the Santiago Bernabeu rather than wait until summer for his contract to expire, but the Reds rejected it.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid slammed for 'INSULTING' Alexander-Arnold bid
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Gary Neville has criticised Real Madrid for submitting an “insulting” January bid for Trent Alexander-Arnold . Speaking to Sky Sports after the game, Neville admitted: “The bid from Real Madrid is bad timing for him [Alexander-Arnold].

arts.ttl: Deportiva Minera vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Copa del Rey online
arts.sum: HOW TO WATCH, STREAM COPA DEL REY Real Madrid visit Murcia to face Deportiva Minera in the Round of 32 of the Copa del Rey. It’s fair and safe to say that this domestic tournament is never a priority for Real Madrid but instead a good chance for the coaching staff to find minutes for the reserves and the young players who need to develop.

arts.ttl: Deportiva Minera vs Real Madrid, 2025 Copa del Rey: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted XI: Lunin, Lorenzo, Tchouameni, Asencio, Fran Garcia, Camavinga, Guler, Modric, Brahim, Rodrygo, Endrick. Real Madrid visit Deportiva Minera in the Copa del Rey’s Round of 32.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting lineup against Deportiva Minera
arts.sum: Real Madrid will make their Copa del Rey debut on Monday, facing Deportiva Minera, a team from Murcia competing in the Second RFEF Division, equivalent to the old Third Division. Who will play for Real Madrid in the Copa del Rey?

arts.ttl: Lucas Vazquez’s Real Madrid future hangs on Trent Alexander-Arnold saga
arts.sum: Real Madrid will wait until the end of the season to make a decision on Lucas Vazquez’s future at the club as per Relevo. Los Blancos are open to extending his contract beyond its expiry at the end of the season via their policy over players aged 30+. arts.ttl: River Plate will block Real Madrid interest in rising teen star
arts.sum: Real Madrid will not make a January move for River Plate star Franco Mastantuono. Los Blancos have been tracking the 17-year-old for over 12 months, with reports in 2024 from Marca reporting he was keen on a move to Madrid, as they reached an understanding on terms. However, despite the ongoing link, Mastantuono is under […] The post River Plate will block Real Madrid interest in rising teen star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star to return to starting XI for Deportiva Minera clash
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid is expected to return to starting duties in the club’s upcoming meeting with Deportiva Minera. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: 'Real Madrid? More like Tranmere' - has future talk 'affected' Trent?
arts.sum: A disappointing display in Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United has prompted questions about whether Trent Alexander-Arnold has been affected by talk about his future, with his contract ending this summer and Real Madrid interested?
